title: KV cache 在昇腾上的落地：分配、reshape 与绑定
one_line_thesis: ch13 算 KV 预算、ch15 跑前向，本章管 KV 张量怎么在 NPU 显存里物化、摆放、挂回各层——讲清昇腾在「KV 显存几何」上相对基座 gpu_model_runner.py 非改不可的三件事：(1) KV 一律先以 int8 裸字节分配再 view 成目标 dtype；(2) 为 prefill 解耦把每层 KV 拆成独立的 K/V(/dsa_k/dsa_k_scale) 子张量并把每块首地址 2MB 对齐；(3) 用 torch.as_strided 按 page_size_bytes 跨步重排出 NPU 物理布局，而非基座的 contiguous view + stride_order permute。

source_pins.ascend_runner: vllm_ascend/worker/model_runner_v1.py @ instances/vllm-ascend/source (host 无 NPU/CANN 不可真跑)
source_pins.base_runner: vllm/v1/worker/gpu_model_runner.py @ instances/vllm/source (vLLM v0.21.0 对照基座)

code_spine: vllm_ascend/worker/model_runner_v1.py:L3700-L3742  initialize_kv_cache(): KV cache 物化总入口——deepcopy config → 各种 add_layers → initialize_attn_backend → may_reinitialize_input_batch → initialize_kv_cache_tensors（本章主线从这里起）

vllm_ascend/worker/model_runner_v1.py:L3764-L3813  initialize_kv_cache_tensors(): 三步骨架 = _allocate_kv_cache_tensors → _reshape_kv_cache_tensors → 按模型特化 bind（deepseek_v4 层序 / longcat 双 module / hamming sparse）
vllm_ascend/worker/model_runner_v1.py:L3929-L4109  _allocate_kv_cache_tensors(): 昇腾内存几何核心——按 spec 类型分支，int8 裸分配、按 split_factor 拆 K/V、prefill 解耦的 2MB 对齐、sparse-c8 indexer 张量
vllm_ascend/worker/model_runner_v1.py:L3758-L3762  _align_memory(): 把一个 tensor 的 data_ptr 抬到 alignment 边界后切片返回
vllm_ascend/worker/model_runner_v1.py:L3847-L3849  _align_up(): 整数向上取整到 alignment 倍数（纯算术）
vllm_ascend/worker/model_runner_v1.py:L3851-L3872  _allocate_int8_cache_tensor(): 统一的 int8 裸分配；开 kv_transfer 时多分配 alignment 字节再 _align_memory 对齐首地址
vllm_ascend/worker/model_runner_v1.py:L3874-L3927  _allocate_sparse_c8_indexer_tensors(): dsa_k 与 dsa_k_scale 共享一块对齐 int8 裸内存的两个逻辑视图（减少 HCCL/Mooncake 注册次数）
vllm_ascend/worker/model_runner_v1.py:L4111-L4141  _adjust_kv_layout(): 用 torch.as_strided 按 page_size_bytes 推 stride，给 sparse/compress MLA 做 NPU 物理布局重排
vllm_ascend/worker/model_runner_v1.py:L4144-L4462  _reshape_kv_cache_tensors(): 把裸 int8 张量 .view(dtype).view(shape) 成可用 KV；MLA 分 nope(k)/rope(v)、sparse 再叠 dsa_k/dsa_k_scale、mamba 走 conv/ssm 跨步切分
vllm_ascend/worker/model_runner_v1.py:L4464-L4554  may_reinitialize_input_batch(): 多 KV group / block_size 与 cache_config 不一致时重建 NPUInputBatch，并据 backend 算 kernel_block_sizes
vllm_ascend/worker/model_runner_v1.py:L4657-L4766  get_kv_cache_spec(): 解析各 attention module 产出 KVCacheSpec；MLA 路径改用 AscendMLAAttentionSpec（回指 ch04），mamba page_size 对齐

对照基座 vllm/v1/worker/gpu_model_runner.py:L6637-L6667 _allocate（单 int8、不拆 K/V、无对齐）、L6678-L6803 _reshape（contiguous view + stride_order permute）、L6839-L6892 initialize（uniform kv cache 快路 + bind）、L6572-L6635 may_reinitialize

embed_excerpts.code:
def initialize_kv_cache_tensors(self, kv_cache_config: KVCacheConfig) -> dict[str, torch.Tensor]:
        """
        Initialize the memory buffer for KV cache.
        ...
        """
        # Initialize the memory buffer for KV cache
        kv_cache_raw_tensors = self._allocate_kv_cache_tensors(kv_cache_config)
        # Change the memory buffer to the desired shape
        kv_caches = self._reshape_kv_cache_tensors(kv_cache_config, kv_cache_raw_tensors)

        # Set up cross-layer KV cache sharing
        for layer_name, target_layer_name in self.shared_kv_cache_layers.items():
            logger.debug("%s reuses KV cache of %s", layer_name, target_layer_name)
            kv_caches[layer_name] = kv_caches[target_layer_name]

        if self.model_config.hf_text_config.model_type == "deepseek_v4":
            from vllm_ascend.utils import extract_dsv4_layer_index

            assert len(self.kv_caches) == 0
            for layer_name in sorted(
                    kv_caches,
                    key=lambda name: (extract_dsv4_layer_index(
                        self.model_config.hf_text_config, name), name)):
                self.kv_caches.append(kv_caches[layer_name])
            for layer_name, kv_cache in kv_caches.items():
                self.compilation_config.static_forward_context[
                    layer_name].kv_cache = [kv_cache]
        else:
            from vllm.v1.worker.utils import bind_kv_cache

            num_attn_module = 2 if self.model_config.hf_text_config.model_type == "longcat_flash" else 1
            bind_kv_cache(kv_caches, self.compilation_config.static_forward_context, self.kv_caches, num_attn_module)

        if self.enable_hamming_sparse is True:
            from vllm_ascend.worker.kvcomp_utils import init_and_bind_hashk_cache
            init_and_bind_hashk_cache(
                kv_caches=kv_caches,
                num_attn_module=num_attn_module,
                vllm_config=self.vllm_config,
                device=self.device,
                compilation_config=self.compilation_config,
                kvcomp_meta_data=self.kvcomp_meta_data
            )

        return kv_caches
elide: docstring 正文（Args/Returns）已折叠；hamming_sparse 分支可只点名不展开。三步骨架 allocate→reshape→bind 是叙事主干，bind 的三分支（deepseek_v4 自定层序 / 普通 bind_kv_cache / longcat num_attn_module=2）是本章 bind 一节的核心。
两个对齐原语放一起讲：_align_up 是纯整数向上取整；_align_memory 把它用在 data_ptr 上——分配时多要 alignment 字节，再把张量起点切到对齐边界。这是「为什么昇腾要对齐、对齐到多少」的算术答案。
这是「KV 一律 int8 裸分配」的物化点：无 kv_transfer 时直接 torch.zeros(int8)；开 kv_transfer 时多分配 alignment 字节 + _align_memory 把首地址对齐到 2MB，便于 RDMA 注册。可作精简版可跑示范（CPU 上 data_ptr 对齐算术成立）。

embed_excerpts.code:
def _allocate_sparse_c8_indexer_tensors(
        self,
        dsa_k_tensor_size: int,
        dsa_k_scale_tensor_size: int,
        alignment: int,
        scale_dtype: torch.dtype,
    ) -> tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]:
        """Allocate dsa_k and dsa_k_scale from one aligned int8 raw allocation.
        ...
        """
        if dsa_k_tensor_size <= 0:
            raise ValueError(...)
        if dsa_k_scale_tensor_size <= 0:
            raise ValueError(...)

        scale_dtype_size = torch.empty((), dtype=scale_dtype).element_size()

        # Ensure the scale view starts at an address aligned for scale_dtype.
        scale_offset = self._align_up(dsa_k_tensor_size, scale_dtype_size)
        total_raw_size = scale_offset + dsa_k_scale_tensor_size

        sparse_c8_raw_tensor = self._allocate_int8_cache_tensor(
            total_raw_size,
            alignment,
        )

        dsa_k_tensor = sparse_c8_raw_tensor[:dsa_k_tensor_size]
        dsa_k_scale_tensor = sparse_c8_raw_tensor[
            scale_offset : scale_offset + dsa_k_scale_tensor_size
        ]

        assert dsa_k_tensor.is_contiguous()
        assert dsa_k_scale_tensor.is_contiguous()
        assert dsa_k_scale_tensor.data_ptr() % scale_dtype_size == 0
        assert dsa_k_scale_tensor.numel() % scale_dtype_size == 0

        return dsa_k_tensor, dsa_k_scale_tensor
elide: docstring 的 ASCII 图与 ValueError 文案折叠。要点：DeepSeek-V3.2 sparse-c8 indexer 的 dsa_k(int8) 与 dsa_k_scale(scale_dtype) 共享同一块对齐 int8 裸内存的两个视图——用 _align_up 把 scale 视图的起点对齐到 scale_dtype 边界，从而把两段合并成一次 register_buffer，减少 HCCL/Mooncake 注册条目。这是『sparse-c8 indexer tensors』一节的源码。

def _allocate_kv_cache_tensors(self, kv_cache_config: KVCacheConfig) -> dict[str, torch.Tensor]:
        """
        ...
        NOTE: To support prefill disaggregation, we need to split kvcache tensor into
        k_cache and v cache, and the addr of both are aligned by 2M
        ...
        """
        kv_cache_raw_tensors: dict[str, torch.Tensor | torch.Tensor | None | None] = {}
        # prefill disaggregation need the addr of cache tensor be aligned with 2M
        alignment = 2 * 1024 * 1024
        layer_kv_cache_spec = self._get_layer_kv_cache_specs(kv_cache_config)
        ...
        for kv_cache_tensor in kv_cache_config.kv_cache_tensors:
            ...
            for idx in range(len(kv_cache_tensor.shared_by)):
                layer_name = kv_cache_tensor.shared_by[idx]
                ...
                elif "attn" in layer_name and layer_name not in kv_cache_raw_tensors and not use_mamba:
                    # NOTE: We need to init k cache tensor (nope cache tensor in mla) and
                    # v cache tensor (rope cache tensor in mla) separately to support prefill disaggregation,
                    # as it only support the 0-dim of kv_cache is `num_blocks`.
                    current_kv_cache_spec = layer_kv_cache_spec[layer_name]
                    assert isinstance(current_kv_cache_spec, AttentionSpec)

                    if self.use_sparse:
                        # for deepseek v3.2, we split the kv cache according to the corresponding ratio
                        kv_cache_spec = layer_kv_cache_spec[layer_name]
                        current_sparse_c8 = kv_cache_spec_uses_sparse_c8(kv_cache_spec)
                        sparse_kv_cache_ratio = kv_cache_spec.sparse_kv_cache_ratio
                        ...
                    else:
                        k_dim, v_dim = self._get_attention_kv_cache_dims(layer_name, current_kv_cache_spec)
                        assert k_dim > 0 and v_dim > 0
                        kv_head_dim_list = [k_dim, v_dim]
                        if enable_fa_quant(self.vllm_config):
                            k_tensor_split_factor, v_tensor_split_factor = (
                                self.vllm_config.quant_config.get_kv_quant_split_factor(layer_name, kv_head_dim_list)
                            )
                        else:
                            k_tensor_split_factor, v_tensor_split_factor = calc_split_factor(kv_head_dim_list)

                    k_tensor_size = int(kv_cache_tensor.size // k_tensor_split_factor)
                    if v_tensor_split_factor is not None:
                        v_tensor_size = int(kv_cache_tensor.size // v_tensor_split_factor)
                    else:
                        v_tensor_size = None
                    ...
                    # Allocate raw int8 tensors. Even bf16/fp16 KV cache entries
                    # are allocated as int8 raw bytes first and then viewed as
                    # the target dtype in _reshape_kv_cache_tensors.
                    ...
                    k_tensor = self._allocate_int8_cache_tensor(k_tensor_size, alignment)
                    if v_tensor_size is not None:
                        v_tensor = self._allocate_int8_cache_tensor(v_tensor_size, alignment)
                    ...
                    for layer_name_inner in kv_cache_tensor.shared_by:
                        if "attn" in layer_name_inner and "linear_attn" not in layer_name_inner:
                            if self.use_sparse:
                                ...
                            else:
                                kv_cache_raw_tensors[layer_name_inner] = (k_tensor, v_tensor)
        layer_names = set()
        for group in kv_cache_config.kv_cache_groups:
            for layer_name in group.layer_names:
                if layer_name in self.runner_only_attn_layers:
                    continue
                layer_names.add(layer_name)
        assert layer_names == set(kv_cache_raw_tensors.keys()), "Some layers are not correctly initialized"

        return kv_cache_raw_tensors
elide: 此方法 ~180 行；上面摘出叙事主干（standard attn 分支）：(1) alignment=2MB 常量，(2) 按 split_factor 把整块 KV 切成独立 K/V 子张量，(3) 每个子张量走 _allocate_int8_cache_tensor。**省略但需在正文点名**：顶部 linear_attn/mamba/cache_only_layers 单张量分支（L3962-L3980）、use_compress 分支（L3981-L3992）、sparse-c8 的 A5/A3 ratio 解包（L4002-L4019、L4042-L4045）、sparse 的 dsa_k(/scale) 分配与多元组 raw_tensors 装配（L4063-L4096）。正文给出 calc_split_factor=[total/num] 的算术（vllm_ascend/utils.py:L1441），说明 K/V 拆分比例从 head 维度推导。对照基座只 torch.zeros 单块 int8、不拆。

embed_excerpts.code:
def _adjust_kv_layout(
        self,
        raw_tensor: torch.Tensor,
        kv_cache_shape_list: list[int],
        kv_cache_dtype_list: list[int],
        page_size_bytes: int,
        overlap_full_kv_cache: bool = False,
    ):
        reshaped_kv_tensors = []
        base_storage_offset_bytes = raw_tensor.storage_offset()
        storage_offset_bytes = base_storage_offset_bytes
        for idx, (shape, dtype) in enumerate(zip(kv_cache_shape_list, kv_cache_dtype_list)):
            if overlap_full_kv_cache and idx == 2:
                storage_offset_bytes = base_storage_offset_bytes
            dtype_size = get_dtype_size(dtype)
            num_element_per_page = (
                page_size_bytes // dtype_size
            )

            stride = torch.empty(shape).stride()
            target_stride = (num_element_per_page, *stride[1:])
            assert storage_offset_bytes % dtype_size == 0
            tensor = torch.as_strided(
                raw_tensor.view(dtype),
                size=shape,
                stride=target_stride,
                storage_offset=storage_offset_bytes // dtype_size,
            )
            reshaped_kv_tensors.append(tensor)
            storage_offset_bytes += stride[0] * dtype_size
        return reshaped_kv_tensors
elide: 『_adjust_kv_layout——NPU 布局调整』一节的源码。核心几何：把 block 维（第 0 维）的 stride 强制成 page_size_bytes//dtype_size（num_element_per_page），其余维保持自然 stride——这样每个 block 在物理上以 page_size 对齐、可与 indexer 的多段视图(k/scale/full)在同一裸张量上 overlap。overlap_full_kv_cache 时 idx==2 的 full 视图复用起始 offset。纯 torch.as_strided 算术，CPU 上可跑验证维度推导。

def _reshape_kv_cache_tensors(
        self,
        kv_cache_config: KVCacheConfig,
        kv_cache_raw_tensors: dict[str, torch.Tensor],
    ) -> dict[str, torch.Tensor]:
        """Reshape the KV cache tensors to the desired shape and dtype."""
        kv_caches: dict[str, torch.Tensor] = {}
        layer_kv_cache_spec = self._get_layer_kv_cache_specs(kv_cache_config)
        for group in self._kv_cache_spec_attn_group_iterator():
            attn_backend = group.backend
            current_kv_cache_spec = group.kv_cache_spec
            for layer_name in group.layer_names:
                if layer_name in self.runner_only_attn_layers:
                    continue
                current_kv_cache_spec = layer_kv_cache_spec[layer_name]
                ...
                elif isinstance(current_kv_cache_spec, AttentionSpec):
                    if self.use_sparse and "cache_only_layers" not in layer_name:
                        ...  # unpack (k, v, dsa_k[, scale]) raw tuple, sum numels
                    else:
                        raw_k_tensor, raw_v_tensor = kv_cache_raw_tensors[layer_name]
                        sum_page_size_bytes = raw_k_tensor.numel() + raw_v_tensor.numel()
                    assert raw_k_tensor is not None
                    assert sum_page_size_bytes % current_kv_cache_spec.page_size_bytes == 0
                    num_blocks = sum_page_size_bytes // current_kv_cache_spec.page_size_bytes
                    assert num_blocks >= kv_cache_config.num_blocks
                    ...
                    kv_cache_shape = attn_backend.get_kv_cache_shape(
                        num_blocks,
                        current_kv_cache_spec.block_size,
                        current_kv_cache_spec.num_kv_heads,
                        current_kv_cache_spec.head_size,
                    )
                    if not isinstance(current_kv_cache_spec, MLAAttentionSpec):
                        k_shape = kv_cache_shape[1:]
                        if hasattr(current_kv_cache_spec, "head_size_v"):
                            v_shape = (*kv_cache_shape[1:-1], current_kv_cache_spec.head_size_v)
                        else:
                            v_shape = k_shape
                    else:
                        # k_cache: nope_cache    v_cache: rope_cache
                        mla_num_blocks, mla_block_size, num_kv_heads, _ = kv_cache_shape
                        k_dim, v_dim = self._get_attention_kv_cache_dims(layer_name, current_kv_cache_spec)
                        k_shape = (mla_num_blocks, mla_block_size, num_kv_heads, k_dim)
                        ...
                        v_shape = (mla_num_blocks, mla_block_size, num_kv_heads, v_dim)
                    k_cache_dtype = v_cache_dtype = current_kv_cache_spec.dtype
                    ...
                    k_cache = raw_k_tensor.view(k_cache_dtype).view(k_shape)
                    ...
                        v_cache = raw_v_tensor.view(v_cache_dtype).view(v_shape)

                    if self.use_sparse:
                        dsa_k_cache_shape = (
                            num_blocks,
                            current_kv_cache_spec.block_size,
                            current_kv_cache_spec.num_kv_heads,
                            self.model_config.hf_text_config.index_head_dim,
                        )
                        ...  # dsa_k / dsa_k_scale .view(...).view(shape)
                    else:
                        kv_caches[layer_name] = (k_cache, v_cache)
                elif isinstance(current_kv_cache_spec, MambaSpec):
                    ...  # conv/ssm as_strided split with kv-padding
                else:
                    raise ValueError("Unknown KV cache spec type.")
        return kv_caches
elide: 此方法 ~320 行；摘出叙事主干：标准 attn 与 MLA 的 shape 推导 + raw_k_tensor.view(dtype).view(shape) 把 int8 裸字节还原成目标 dtype 的 KV。**省略但需点名**：顶部 use_compress 的 MLA indexer 走 _adjust_kv_layout 分支（L4173-L4225，连接上一节）、sparse-c8 A5/A3 的多元组解包（L4232-L4261）、hybrid attn+mamba 的 conv_block_padding 切分（L4301-L4331）、cache_only_layers 单张量分支（L4267-L4282）、enable_fa_quant 的 dtype 改写（L4374-L4382）、mamba 分支的 as_strided conv/ssm 切分（L4425-L4458，对照基座 L6773-L6796）。MLA 把 head_size 拆成 nope(k_dim)/rope(v_dim) 两份 cache 是昇腾内存几何的关键。

embed_excerpts.code:
def may_reinitialize_input_batch(self, kv_cache_config: KVCacheConfig) -> None:
        """Re-initialize the input batch if the block sizes are different ..."""
        block_sizes = [
            kv_cache_group.kv_cache_spec.block_size
            for kv_cache_group in kv_cache_config.kv_cache_groups
            if not isinstance(kv_cache_group.kv_cache_spec, EncoderOnlyAttentionSpec)
        ]
        self.kernel_block_sizes = []
        for kv_cache_group_id, kv_cache_group in enumerate(kv_cache_config.kv_cache_groups):
            ...
            kv_cache_spec = kv_cache_group.kv_cache_spec
            if isinstance(kv_cache_spec, UniformTypeKVCacheSpecs):
                kv_cache_spec = next(iter(kv_cache_spec.kv_cache_specs.values()))
            if isinstance(kv_cache_spec, EncoderOnlyAttentionSpec):
                continue
            elif isinstance(kv_cache_spec, AttentionSpec):
                attn_groups = self.attn_groups[kv_cache_group_id]
                backends = [attn_group.backend for attn_group in attn_groups]
                kv_manager_block_size = kv_cache_group.kv_cache_spec.block_size
                selected_kernel_size = select_common_block_size(
                    kv_manager_block_size, backends
                )
                self.kernel_block_sizes.append([selected_kernel_size])
            else:
                self.kernel_block_sizes.append([0])
        ...
        if (block_sizes != [self.cache_config.block_size]
                or self.kernel_block_sizes != [[self.cache_config.block_size]]
                or len(kv_cache_config.kv_cache_groups) > 1):
            assert self.offload_config.uva.cpu_offload_gb == 0, (...)
            self.input_batch = NPUInputBatch(
                max_num_reqs=self.max_num_reqs,
                max_model_len=max_model_len,
                ...
                block_sizes=block_sizes,
                ...
                kernel_block_sizes=self.kernel_block_sizes,
                max_num_blocks_per_req=max_num_blocks,
                kv_cache_groups=kv_cache_config.kv_cache_groups,
            )
elide: pcp_manager.initialize_slot_mapping、max_num_blocks 计算循环、NPUInputBatch 的完整参数列表折叠。要点：当存在多 KV group 或 block_size 与 cache_config.block_size 不一致（昇腾常见，如 ch04 的 16→128）时，重建 NPUInputBatch；kernel_block_sizes 由各 backend 的 select_common_block_size 决定（attn 走虚拟 block 切分，mamba 用 [0] 关闭）。对照基座 gpu_model_runner.py:L6572 用 InputBatch 且签名带 kernel_block_sizes 参数——昇腾把它存成 self.kernel_block_sizes 实例属性。

                if self.use_sparse:

                    kv_cache_spec[layer_name] = AscendMLAAttentionSpec(

                        head_size=sum(self.sparse_head_dim),

                    if getattr(attn_module.impl, "fa_quant_layer", False):

                    )
                    attn_layer_names.add(layer_name)
elide: get_kv_cache_spec 全方法 ~110 行；只摘 MLA 分支，因为它是『昇腾把 MLAAttentionSpec 改用 AscendMLAAttentionSpec』的落点（spec 子类化已在 ch04 详讲，本章回指即可）。**省略点名**：Attention/MambaBase/CacheOnlyAttentionLayer 分支、shared_kv_cache_layers 跳过、末尾 mamba page_size 对齐（L4755-L4764，与 _allocate 顶部 mamba 单张量分支呼应）。注意 import 名是 MLAAttentionSpec，但注释说明它在运行时已被 patch 成 AscendMLAAttentionSpec，所以重命名导入以示意。
对照锚点：基座每层就是一块 torch.zeros(size, int8)，整块共享给 shared_by 的所有层，**不拆 K/V、不做地址对齐、没有 sparse/dsa 分支**。把它与昇腾 L3929 的近 180 行并排，读者一眼看出昇腾在『分配』这一步多做了哪些非改不可的事。

embed_excerpts.code:
kv_cache_shape = tuple(
                        kv_cache_shape[i] for i in kv_cache_stride_order
                    )
                    # Maintain original KV shape view.
                    inv_order = [
                        kv_cache_stride_order.index(i)
                        for i in range(len(kv_cache_stride_order))
                    ]
                    raw_tensor = kv_cache_raw_tensors[layer_name].view(dtype)
                    if kv_cache_spec.page_size_padded is not None:
                        dtype_size = get_dtype_size(dtype)
                        page_stride = kv_cache_spec.page_size_bytes // dtype_size
                        strides = list(torch.empty(kv_cache_shape).stride())
                        strides[inv_order[0]] = page_stride
                        kv_cache = torch.as_strided(
                            raw_tensor,
                            size=kv_cache_shape,
                            stride=tuple(strides),
                        )
                    else:
                        # No padding — safe to use a contiguous view.
                        kv_cache = raw_tensor.view(kv_cache_shape)
                    kv_caches[layer_name] = kv_cache.permute(*inv_order)
elide: 对照锚点：基座 reshape 走 backend 的 get_kv_cache_stride_order + permute（保留 backend 定义的 stride 序），整块 raw_tensor 一次 view 成完整 KV 形状（K/V 同一张量内的 size-2 维），仅在 page_size_padded 时用 as_strided。昇腾因为把 K/V 物理拆成两张独立 int8 张量、且要支持 dsa_k/dsa_k_scale 多视图 overlap，无法走这条 permute 路，改用自己的 _adjust_kv_layout / 多次 view(dtype).view(shape)。
K/V 拆分比例的算术来源：给 [k_dim, v_dim]，返回 [(k+v)/k, (k+v)/v]；_allocate 用 kv_cache_tensor.size // factor 把整块按 head 维度占比切成 K 子张量和 V 子张量。纯函数，精简版可直接跑出数值。

key_classes.name: NPUModelRunner
key_classes.responsibility: 昇腾版 GPUModelRunner；覆写 initialize_kv_cache_tensors / _allocate_kv_cache_tensors / _reshape_kv_cache_tensors / may_reinitialize_input_batch / get_kv_cache_spec 改 KV 显存几何；新增 _align_memory/_align_up/_allocate_int8_cache_tensor/_allocate_sparse_c8_indexer_tensors/_adjust_kv_layout 等昇腾专属原语

key_classes.name: AscendMLAAttentionSpec
key_classes.responsibility: MLA 层的 KVCacheSpec；昇腾在 import 时把 MLAAttentionSpec patch 成它，扩展 sparse_head_dim/cache_sparse_c8/scale_dtype/page_size_bytes 等字段（子类化细节已在 ch04 讲，本章回指）

key_classes.name: AttentionSpec / MLAAttentionSpec / MambaSpec / EncoderOnlyAttentionSpec / UniformTypeKVCacheSpecs
key_classes.responsibility: KVCacheSpec 家族；_allocate/_reshape 按其类型分派出不同内存几何（标准 attn 拆 K/V、MLA 拆 nope/rope、mamba 拆 conv/ssm）

key_classes.name: KVCacheConfig / KVCacheTensor / KVCacheGroupSpec
key_classes.responsibility: ch13 算出的 KV 预算载体：kv_cache_tensors 给每层/共享组的字节大小，kv_cache_groups 给 block_size 等；本章据它物化真实张量

key_classes.name: NPUInputBatch
key_classes.responsibility: 昇腾输入批；may_reinitialize_input_batch 在多 group/异构 block_size 时据 kernel_block_sizes 重建它

key_classes.name: bind_kv_cache
key_classes.responsibility: 把 kv_caches dict 按 layer_index 排序填进 runner_kv_caches 并挂到 forward_context 各层；昇腾普通模型直接复用，deepseek_v4 改走自定层序、longcat 传 num_attn_module=2、hamming_sparse 额外 init_and_bind_hashk_cache

data_flow: 2. initialize_kv_cache_tensors(): 调 _allocate_kv_cache_tensors 拿到 {layer: int8裸张量(或K/V/dsa元组)}

3. _allocate_kv_cache_tensors(): alignment=2MB；_get_layer_kv_cache_specs 拿每层 spec；按 layer_name/spec 类型分支 → 标准 attn 走 calc_split_factor 拆 [k_tensor_size, v_tensor_size] → _allocate_int8_cache_tensor 各分一块对齐 int8 → 装成 (k_tensor, v_tensor) 元组；sparse 再叠 dsa_k(/scale)；mamba/linear/cache_only 走单张量分支；末尾断言 layer_names 全覆盖
4. initialize_kv_cache_tensors(): 调 _reshape_kv_cache_tensors 把裸字节还原成带 dtype/shape 的 KV

5. _reshape_kv_cache_tensors(): 遍历 attn group → 每层取 raw 元组 → 由 sum(numel)/page_size_bytes 反推 num_blocks → attn_backend.get_kv_cache_shape 得 shape → 标准 attn k_shape=shape[1:]、MLA 拆 nope(k_dim)/rope(v_dim) → raw_k_tensor.view(dtype).view(k_shape) 等 → sparse 再 view 出 dsa_k/dsa_k_scale → use_compress/sparse MLA 走 _adjust_kv_layout 用 as_strided 按 page_size_bytes 跨步重排

6. initialize_kv_cache_tensors(): shared_kv_cache_layers 做跨层复用 → 按 model_type 分派 bind：deepseek_v4 用 extract_dsv4_layer_index 排序后手填 self.kv_caches + static_forward_context；否则 bind_kv_cache(num_attn_module=longcat?2:1)；enable_hamming_sparse 再 init_and_bind_hashk_cache
7. 回到 initialize_kv_cache(): 若有 drafter/kv_transfer/routed_experts 再做相应注册（非本章主线）
并行支线：get_kv_cache_spec() 在更早阶段被 worker 调用，产出 {layer: KVCacheSpec}（MLA→AscendMLAAttentionSpec），是上面整条流的输入契约

design_decisions.decision: KV 一律先以 int8 裸字节分配，再在 reshape 阶段 .view(dtype).view(shape)
design_decisions.why: 统一分配路径：无论 bf16/fp16/fp8/int8-quant KV，分配器只跟字节数打交道，dtype 留到 reshape 决定；也让 prefill 解耦/RDMA 注册按字节对齐成为可能

design_decisions.decision: 每层 KV 物理拆成独立的 K/V(/dsa_k/dsa_k_scale) 子张量，且每块首地址按 2MB 对齐
design_decisions.why: 支持 prefill disaggregation（PD 分离）——传输要求 kv_cache 的 0 维是 num_blocks 且 K、V 各自连续；Mooncake/ADXL RDMA 注册要求 2MB 对齐首地址。基座单块整张量无法满足
design_decisions.evidence: vllm_ascend/worker/model_runner_v1.py:L3934-L3935 与 L3947-L3948 注释 + L3994-L3998 注释 + L3858-L3872 _align_memory

design_decisions.decision: K/V 拆分比例用 calc_split_factor 从 head 维度推导 (k_dim,v_dim)→[(k+v)/k,(k+v)/v]
design_decisions.why: MLA 的 nope/rope 维度不等、GQA 的 K/V head 数对称，按维度占比切分才能让两块字节数正确反映各自负载

design_decisions.decision: NPU 物理布局用 _adjust_kv_layout 的 torch.as_strided 把 block 维 stride 设为 page_size_bytes//dtype_size，而非基座的 get_kv_cache_stride_order + permute
design_decisions.why: 昇腾把 K/V 拆成多张独立张量、且 sparse-c8 indexer 的 k/scale/full 三段视图要在同一裸内存上 overlap，基座那套『整块 view + 按 backend stride_order permute』的路走不通

design_decisions.decision: sparse-c8 的 dsa_k 与 dsa_k_scale 合并到一块对齐 int8 裸分配的两个视图
design_decisions.why: register_buffer 能把相邻两段合并成一个注册内存区间，降低 HCCL/Mooncake 注册条目数

design_decisions.decision: bind 阶段按模型特化：deepseek_v4 自定层序、longcat num_attn_module=2、hamming_sparse 额外初始化
design_decisions.why: deepseek_v4 的 MTP 层在 config 数组里排在主模型层之后（extract_dsv4_layer_index），不能用 bind_kv_cache 的默认 layer_index 排序；longcat_flash 每解码层含 2 个 attention module；hamming 稀疏需额外 hashk cache

design_decisions.decision: MLA 的 head_size 在 reshape 时拆成 nope(k_dim) 与 rope(v_dim) 两份 cache（k_cache=nope, v_cache=rope）
design_decisions.why: DeepSeek MLA 的压缩 KV 由 kv_lora_rank(nope) 和 qk_rope_head_dim(rope) 两段构成，物理上分别落到 K/V 两块张量

design_decisions.decision: may_reinitialize_input_batch 用 select_common_block_size 算 kernel_block_sizes 并存为实例属性
design_decisions.why: 昇腾 attention backend 支持 virtual block splitting，KV-manager 的 block_size 与 kernel 实际用的 block_size 可不同；多 KV group/异构 block_size（如 ch04 16→128）时必须重建 NPUInputBatch。基座把 kernel_block_sizes 作显式参数传入，昇腾改为实例字段以贯穿后续分配

theory: 对齐算术：_align_up(v,a)=ceil(v/a)*a=(v+a-1)//a*a；_align_memory 多分配 a 字节后把起点抬到 ((ptr+a-1)//a*a)，最坏浪费 < a=2MB。2MB 来自昇腾大页/RDMA 注册粒度。
K/V 字节切分：给整块字节数 S 与 head 维度 (k_dim,v_dim)，calc_split_factor → k 占 S*k/(k+v)、v 占 S*v/(k+v)；k_tensor_size=S//((k+v)/k)=S*k/(k+v)。对 GQA(k_dim==v_dim) 恰好对半。
num_blocks 反推：reshape 不重新读 block 数，而由 sum(子张量 numel)/page_size_bytes 反算 num_blocks，并断言 ≥ kv_cache_config.num_blocks（不同卡层数/容量不同，config.num_blocks 取全局 min）。
as_strided 几何：把 block(第0)维 stride 固定为 page_size_bytes//dtype_size=num_element_per_page，使逻辑相邻 block 在物理上恰好跨一个 page；这让多段视图（k/scale/full）能落在同一裸张量、按 page 对齐 overlap，是 NPU 布局与 GPU contiguous 视图的本质差异。
page_size_bytes 一致性：标准 attn 整块字节数 = num_blocks * page_size_bytes；MLA 含 padding 时由 page_size_padded 体现。这些值的来源（AscendMLAAttentionSpec.page_size_bytes）在 ch04 已推导，本章只消费。

delete.what: initialize_kv_cache() 里 speculative_config/drafter.initialize_attn_backend 分支（L3729-L3735）、has_kv_transfer_group register（L3737-L3738）、enable_return_routed_experts（L3740-L3741）及 _bind_routed_experts_capturer 方法（L3743-L3756）
delete.why_safe: 本章主线是 allocate→reshape→bind 的 KV 几何；这些是投机解码/KV 传输/路由专家捕获的旁路注册，删去不影响 KV 张量如何物化与绑定的控制流

delete.what: _allocate_kv_cache_tensors 顶部 linear_attn/mamba/hybrid 单张量分支（L3962-L3980）与 use_compress 分支（L3981-L3992）的分配体，可保留分支条件注释、删去重复的对齐分配体（与标准 attn 分支同构）
delete.why_safe: 三条分支的分配逻辑都是『kv_transfer? 对齐 : torch.zeros(int8)』的重复；精简版保留标准 attn 分支这一份即可示范内存几何，其余以注释点名存在性。must_keep 保住 _allocate_int8_cache_tensor 调用即可

delete.what: _allocate / _reshape 中 sparse-c8 的 A5 vs A3 设备分叉（get_ascend_device_type()==A5 的多个 if/else，如 L4010-L4019、L4089-L4096、L4235-L4256、L4355-L4367、L4413-L4418）——保留 A3/通用一支，删 A5 专属重排
delete.why_safe: A5/A3 是不同昇腾代际的 ratio 排布差异，控制流同构；保留一支足以讲清 sparse-c8 indexer 的『k/(v)/dsa_k/dsa_k_scale 多元组』几何，A5 分叉以注释点名

delete.what: _reshape 中 use_hybrid_blocks 的 conv_block_padding 切分（L4301-L4331）与 mamba 分支细节（L4425-L4458）
delete.why_safe: hybrid attn+mamba 的 padding 对齐是另一专题（与 ch04 mamba block 相关）；本章聚焦 attn/MLA KV 几何，mamba 路保留 isinstance 分支与一句注释即可，不展开 as_strided 切分体
本章只需讲『何时重建 + kernel_block_sizes 怎么来』；CP/encoder/offload 是正交特性，max_num_blocks 是 InputBatch 内部容量计算，删去不影响重建判定与 kernel_block_sizes 装配的主控制流

delete.what: get_kv_cache_spec 的 Attention / MambaBase / CacheOnlyAttentionLayer / shared_kv_cache 分支（L4666-L4695, L4729-L4753）与 mamba page_size 对齐尾段（L4755-L4764）
delete.why_safe: 本章对 spec 只需展示『MLA→AscendMLAAttentionSpec』这一回指 ch04 的落点；其余 module 类型的 spec 解析非本章主线，保留 MLA 分支即可

must_keep.why: 本章主线总入口，allocate→reshape→bind 三步骨架
昇腾内存几何核心：int8 裸分配 + K/V 拆分 + 2MB 对齐都在这
把裸字节 view 回带 dtype/shape 的 KV，MLA 拆 nope/rope 的落点
读者需理解『2MB 对齐怎么实现』的原语
对齐算术原语，sparse-c8 scale offset 也用它
『KV 一律 int8 裸分配』的统一物化点，含 kv_transfer 对齐分支
sparse-c8 indexer 的 dsa_k/dsa_k_scale 共享内存几何
『NPU 布局调整』一节核心，as_strided 按 page_size 跨步
辅线：多 group/异构 block_size 重建 NPUInputBatch + kernel_block_sizes
辅线：spec 解析，MLA→AscendMLAAttentionSpec 回指 ch04
MLA 的 (k_dim,v_dim)=(kv_lora_rank,qk_rope_head_dim) 推导，拆 nope/rope 的依据
K/V 字节拆分比例的算术来源，精简版可跑
普通模型的绑定路径；deepseek_v4/longcat 特化以它为对照
deepseek_v4 自定层序排序键，bind 特化的关键
判定是否走 sparse-c8 几何的开关
MLA spec 子类（patch 自 MLAAttentionSpec），page_size_bytes/sparse_head_dim 字段来源，回指 ch04
NPU 布局重排与 mamba 切分的核心 API，须保留以体现跨步几何
2*1024*1024=2MB 对齐常量，须可见以讲『对齐到多少』
裸分配 dtype，须可见以讲『为何先 int8 再 view』

diagram_plan.name: kv-tensor-lifecycle
diagram_plan.type: horizontal pipeline / 三阶段流程图
diagram_plan.spec: 三大节点 get_kv_cache_spec(产 AscendMLAAttentionSpec) → _allocate_kv_cache_tensors(int8裸块 + 按 split_factor 拆 K/V + 2MB 对齐) → _reshape_kv_cache_tensors(.view(dtype).view(shape) / _adjust_kv_layout) → bind(三分支)。每节点下挂关键产物：spec dict / {layer:(k_tensor,v_tensor)} int8 / {layer:(k_cache,v_cache)} typed / runner_kv_caches+forward_context。Roadmap 高亮节点：本章在『执行脊柱-内存几何面』，左邻 ch13(KV 预算) ch15(前向)，右接 ch22(KV 运行期管理)

diagram_plan.name: alloc-geometry-ascend-vs-base
diagram_plan.spec: 上排基座：一条整 int8 条带（含 size-2 的 K/V 维），一次 view+permute。下排昇腾：同一逻辑 KV 切成两条独立 int8 条带 [K_tensor | V_tensor]，各自 2MB 对齐起点（标 align 箭头），sparse 再加 [dsa_k | dsa_k_scale] 共享条带的两个视图。标注 calc_split_factor 比例、2MB gap。直接服务『昇腾在分配上多做了什么』

diagram_plan.name: adjust-kv-layout-stride
diagram_plan.spec: 画一条 int8 裸张量，as_strided 把 block 维 stride 设为 num_element_per_page=page_size_bytes//dtype_size；展示逻辑 block0/block1/block2 在物理上以 page 对齐落点，overlap_full_kv_cache 时 full 视图复用 base offset。对照基座 contiguous view 的自然 stride。

diagram_plan.name: bind-dispatch
diagram_plan.spec: kv_caches → if model_type==deepseek_v4: extract_dsv4_layer_index 排序→手填 self.kv_caches+static_forward_context；elif longcat_flash: bind_kv_cache(num_attn_module=2)；else: bind_kv_cache(num_attn_module=1)；再 if enable_hamming_sparse: init_and_bind_hashk_cache。三条出边标注各自原因。

foreshadow_due.note: scripts/bible.py due ch16 返回空（无应埋伏笔、无应回收项）。本章自身的外向引用：回指 ch04（AscendMLAAttentionSpec/page_size_bytes/block_size 16→128/bind_kv_cache 跳 NPU raise/int32 slot_mapping 已讲），前引 ch22（KV block 运行期分配/前缀缓存）、Part V ch18+（具体 attention 后端如何消费这些 KV 张量）。
